name: SATIVUS TECH CORP.
summary: PART I Item 1. Description of Business. SATIVUS TECH CORP. (formerly SEEDO CORP.) (the Company, Our or We) was formed on January 16, 2015, under the laws of the State of Delaware. Prior to July 2020, we were involved in producing a plant growing device managed and controlled by an artificial intelligent algorithm, allowing consumers to grow their own herbs and vegetables effortlessly from seed to plant, while providing optimal conditions to assure premium quality produce year-round.
